# LAT — {{PROJECT_OR_FEATURE_NAME}}

This document is the architecture trace and knowledge graph for {{PROJECT_OR_FEATURE_NAME}}. It captures the structural relationships between components, decisions, and constraints discovered during the MVA phase. An agent reading this file gains navigational awareness of the system without reading implementation code.

Conventions follow lat.md style: every section opens with a leading paragraph (≤250 chars) establishing its identity, `[[wikilinks]]` for cross-references, sections independently navigable.

**Generated by:** {{AGENT_OR_PERSON}}
**Date:** {{DATE}}
**Source documents:** MVA.md (archived), [[spec.md]], [[design.md]]

## Module Boundaries

Where the system can be split for independent evolution. Boundaries are validated by MVA evidence — a boundary is real only if the MVA demonstrated that modules on either side can change without cascading.

### Boundary 1 — {{Between X and Y}}

**Validated in:** Cycle {{N}}
**Interface:** {{What crosses the boundary — API contract, event, shared data shape}}
**Independence evidence:** {{What MVA cycle showed these can evolve separately}}

### Boundary 2 — {{Between X and Y}}

**Validated in:** Cycle {{N}}
**Interface:** {{What crosses the boundary}}
**Independence evidence:** {{MVA evidence}}

## Navigation Guide

For agents entering this system for the first time:

1. Read [[spec.md]] for WHAT the system must do
2. Read this file (lat.md) for HOW components relate and WHY decisions were made
3. Read [[design.md]] for implementation-level component details
4. Read [[goal.md]] for execution contract
5. Read [[tools.md]] for runtime dependencies and tool contracts
6. Read [[agents.md]] for behavioral rules during execution
